title: TechnicalTaskRouterRow
description: A single benchmark observation row for a technical task router workflow prediction. The row records the task descriptor, allowed model set, selected workflow models, budget, observed cost, and completion outcome.

schema_version.title: Schema Version
schema_version.description: Version sentinel for this row schema. Must be exactly "technical_task_router_row/v1".

row_id.title: Row ID
row_id.description: Unique identifier for this observation row.

benchmark_spec_id.title: Benchmark Spec ID
benchmark_spec_id.description: ID of the BenchmarkSpec this row belongs to.

model_id.title: Model ID
model_id.description: Hokusai model identifier for the router being evaluated.

task_descriptor.title: Task Descriptor
task_descriptor.description: Structured task descriptor supplied to the router. This schema intentionally leaves descriptor contents opaque so benchmark authors can evolve task fields without changing the row contract.

allowed_models.title: Allowed Models
allowed_models.description: Model identifiers the workflow is allowed to select for this task.

selected_models.title: Selected Models
selected_models.description: Model identifiers selected by the predicted workflow configuration.

max_cost_usd.title: Max Cost USD
max_cost_usd.description: Per-sample budget in USD. The value must be greater than zero.

estimated_cost_usd.title: Estimated Cost USD
estimated_cost_usd.description: Router-estimated workflow cost in USD. Used by diagnostic cost error scorers and does not affect the primary promotion metric.

actual_time_seconds.title: Actual Time Seconds
actual_time_seconds.description: Observed workflow duration in seconds. Null means duration is unknown or unavailable. Diagnostic duration error scoring only treats positive finite values as label coverage.

estimated_duration_seconds.title: Estimated Duration Seconds
estimated_duration_seconds.description: Router-estimated workflow duration in seconds. Null means the model has no positive duration evidence for the strategy.

estimated_success_under_budget.title: Estimated Success Under Budget
estimated_success_under_budget.description: Router-estimated probability that the selected strategy will complete successfully within budget. Used by diagnostic reliability calibration scorers.

routing_objective.title: Routing Objective
routing_objective.description: Strategy objective used to produce this row. Used by objective-specific diagnostic scorers.

completed_successfully.title: Completed Successfully
completed_successfully.description: Whether the workflow completed the task successfully.

scorer_ref.title: Scorer Ref
scorer_ref.description: Primary scorer registry ref for this benchmark row.

observed_at.title: Observed At
observed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this row was observed or computed.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Arbitrary additional metadata for extensibility. Does not affect metric computation.
